title: Magnificently Braised Chinese Beef Cutlet Bao
description: A fresh and pillowy Chinese dish featuring beef cutlet, braise, and keto-friendly ingredients, perfect for a show-off dinner.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the beef cutlets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, fish sauce, and sesame oil.
Pour the sauce over the beef cutlets and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and braise the beef for 10 minutes, until tender.
Meanwhile, toast the baos by baking them in the oven at 350 degrees for 5 minutes.
Assemble the bao by slicing the braised beef and placing it inside the toasted bao.
Garnish with chopped scallions and sesame seeds.
